LanguageData.FFF.BuildingMover.Desc: Move this structure along its facing axis if the destination is clear.
LanguageData.FFF.BuildingMover.RotateDesc: Rotate this structure clockwise if there is room.
LanguageData.FFF.BuildingMover.Place.Toggle: Reciprocating track: toggles back and forth
LanguageData.FFF.BuildingMover.Place.Mine: Mines ore veins it crushes through
LanguageData.DMS.MachineCabinet.Door.OpenDesc: Slides aside to open. Anything in the way is shoved aside and bruised.
LanguageData.DMS.MachineCabinet.Charge.Label: THUNDEROUS CHARGE!
LanguageData.DMS.MachineCabinet.Charge.Desc: Charges forward, crushing everything in its path and tearing ore from the rock.
